mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_audit_logs (actor_user_id, action, target_type, target_id, details_json) VALUES (#{actorUserId}, #{action}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, CAST(#{detailsJson} AS JSONB))
mapper.select: SELECT aal.id AS audit_log_id, aal.actor_user_id, au.login_name AS actor_login_name, aal.action, aal.target_type, aal.target_id, aal.details_json::TEXT AS details_json, aal.created_at FROM admin_audit_logs aal LEFT JOIN app_users au ON au.id = aal.actor_user_id ORDER BY aal.created_at DESC, aal.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
